candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected parent row 'Cost of Goods Sold' because 'Cost of Goods Sold - Balancing value' plus this D&A row reconstruct the selected COGS total. Adding it separately would double count.
This is SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it should not be mapped to COGS_DA.
This is not COGS-related and also appears unpopulated in the excerpt, so it should not be mapped to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Goods Sold'. The explicit COGS D&A line appears embedded within that selected total rather than sitting outside it as a separate same-level operating expense.

candidates.why: This is the explicit SG&A-related D&A row, but it appears to be a component of the already selected parent row 'Selling expenses' because 'Selling expenses - Other' plus this D&A row reconstruct the selected selling expense total. Therefore it should not be added separately.
This could have been a broader SG&A D&A summary row, but it is unpopulated in the excerpt, so there is nothing to add separately.
This belongs to COGS, not SG&A, so it should not be mapped to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses'. The visible selling D&A row appears embedded within 'Selling expenses'. No explicit populated administrative D&A row is visible above operating profit, so conservative treatment is that admin D&A is already embedded in the selected administrative expense row.
